jummah_times: Zohar & Juma Jamat at 1:00 PM till 28th March; from 29th March at 2:00 PM
notes: British Summer Time starts on Sunday 29th March — please put clock one hour forward. Zohar & Juma Jamat is at 1:00 PM till 28th March and from 29th March at 2:00 PM. Jamat times may be changed according to circumstances. Live programmes streamed on www.youtube.com/c/Birmingham Jame Masjid. The 'MAGRIB AZAN & JAMAT' column appears to combine Maghrib Azan and Jama'at into one column — values used as maghrib_iftari. No separate Maghrib Jama'at column exists. Zohar Jamaat applied as 1:00 for non-Fri
